KVK açıklaması

This program aims to train qualified technicians to manage and implement the digitalization processes in industry. It focuses on key areas such as Industry 4.0, the Internet of Things (IoT), automation electronics, and sensor technologies.

Employment Opportunities

Graduates can take part in smart factories, automation systems, electronic maintenance units, and digital infrastructure projects.
